title: Ruroc Atlas 4.0 Excluded Variant

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Liner

technical_analysis: The Ruroc Atlas 4.0 utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber weave pattern that significantly reduces rotational inertia while maintaining structural rigidity against lateral impacts. Unlike standard polycarbonate shells, this composite layer absorbs high-frequency vibration energy, reducing rider fatigue during extended highway runs without compromising the impact dispersion matrix required by ECE 22.06 standards. The internal EPS liner features a multi-density zoned construction, providing superior protection for the occipital region while allowing for precise cheekbone contouring to accommodate diverse head geometries.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight performance with the Ruroc Atlas 4.0, engineered for riders who demand uncompromising safety without sacrificing aerodynamic efficiency. Our advanced carbon fiber shell technology delivers a helmet that feels like an extension of your body, offering a featherlight presence at just 1.42kg while providing military-grade protection against high-velocity impacts.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Ruroc Atlas 4.0 full-face helmet featuring carbon fiber construction, ECE 22.06 certification, and magnetic quick-release straps. Lightweight design for maximum comfort on long rides.
